name_en: Top Original Batch White/Colorful Small! M14033 Collaboration with Takashi Murakami! Nice Nano Makeup Pouch. Crafted in Monogram canvas with a delicate structure. Can be placed in the bathroom to store nail polish or lipsticks, or in a handbag to organize small items. Lay flat the handle to store in a small space. Size: 14x10.2x8.5cm
